title: Nova Iguaçu, RJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nova Iguaçu, RJ: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nova Iguaçu is a city in RJ with a population of 825,388. A large suburb of Rio de Janeiro in the Baixada Fluminense region, known for its commerce and the Tinguá biological reserve.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
